# RCSService.Business.ShowLocationAction.Method.coordinates(_:)

**Case**

Search for location using coordinates.

## Declaration

```swift
case coordinates(CLLocationCoordinate2D)
```

## Determining location method

- **CLLocationCoordinate2D**: The latitude and longitude associated with a location, specified using the WGS 84 reference frame.
- **RCSService.Business.ShowLocationAction.Method.query(_:)**: Search for location(s) by query.

items.description: The latitude and longitude associated with a location, specified using the WGS 84 reference frame.
items.name: CLLocationCoordinate2D
